title: hannafordia bissillii subsp. latifolia
intro: Hannafordia bissillii subsp. latifolia is an evergreen tree species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, native to Australia. Its medicinal properties include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hannafordia bissillii subsp. latifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
